title: dryopteris erythrosora var. purpurascens
intro: Dryopteris erythrosora var. purpurascens, also known as the Autumn Fern, is a variety of the Japanese Autumn Fern (Dryopteris erythrosora) that is native to Japan. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris erythrosora var. purpurascens include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as its potential use in treating various digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
